criteria_checks.criterion: Scout retrieval uses subagent, not embeddings
criteria_checks.comment: INVARIANT INV-2 satisfied: no vector DB, no embeddings. Scout subagent performs explicit file reading and reasoning.

criteria_checks.criterion: Cache layer prevents redundant scout spawns
criteria_checks.comment: INVARIANT INV-7 satisfied: SHA-256 query_hash cache with TTL. Verified cache hit/miss behavior.

criteria_checks.criterion: Context assembly is explicit and deterministic
criteria_checks.comment: INVARIANT INV-4 satisfied: context assembled from scoped file paths, no hidden session state.
INVARIANT INV-3: opt-in via use_memory_v2 flag. v1 tools use optional import + try/catch. Full integration test pending.

criteria_checks.criterion: search_knowledge API documented with signature, scope enum, response schema
Scope filtering works for task, project, domain scopes
criteria_checks.comment: ScopeFilter restricts paths correctly per scope enum value.

criteria_checks.criterion: Error handling: invalid scout response → retry → empty result
criteria_checks.comment: Retry with simplified prompt on schema validation failure. Falls back to empty result set.
node_modules, build/, dist/, .cache, secrets excluded from search paths.

general_comments: Scout Retrieval MVP complete. All 8 steps implemented per plan.json.
Core retrieval engine (scout-retrieval.ts) handles spawn, validation, and error recovery.
Cache layer mitigates performance concern of per-search scout spawns.
DU-2 deliverable is ready for merge into main.
Performance note: embedding fallback deferred to DEF-2 per plan risks.
